calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-09-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-30-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Patty Lee Hubble.
Katarina Rost, Esq. for Plaintiff: University of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witness: Raymond Rogers, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Aimee J. Logue as follows:
Damages $1,762.66
Prejudgment Interest $225.60
No attorney's fees awarded.
Costs $235.30, for a total of $2,223.56
Judgment signed in open court.
